headline: WELL Health Reports Record FY2025 Results; Canadian Patient Services Adjusted EBITDA Up 43% with Record Free Cash Flow
summary: VANCOUVER, British Columbia, March 19, 2026--WELL Health Technologies Corp. (TSX: WELL, OTCQX: WHTCF) (the "Company" or "WELL"), a digital healthcare company focused on positively impacting health outcomes by leveraging technology to empower healthcare practitioners and their patients globally, is pleased to announce it has filed its audited annual financial statements for the fiscal year and fourth quarter ended December 31, 2025, the related management’s discussion and analysis ("MD&A"), and a
